label: u01
title: U1 How can we become good learners? | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: Open your textbook to page 10.
Your pronunciation is getting better!
Can you make a sentence with this word?
words.trans: 你能用这个词造个句子吗？

words.ex: Be patient! Learning takes time.
This is a useful expression.
I discovered a good way to learn grammar.
words.trans: 我发现了一个学语法的好方法。

words.ex: The secret to learning is practice.
Please repeat the sentence after me.
words.trans: 请跟着我重复这个句子。

words.ex: I always take notes in class.
words.trans: 我总是在课堂上做笔记。

words.ex: Reading helps increase your vocabulary.
words.trans: 阅读有助于增加词汇量。

words.ex: You need to improve your reading speed.
Practice with a partner.
She was born with a talent for music.
Everyone has the ability to learn.
words.trans: 每个人都有学习的能力。

words.ex: Create a study plan for yourself.
words.trans: 为自己创建一个学习计划。

words.ex: The brain needs exercise too.
Stay active in class discussions.
words.trans: 在课堂讨论中保持积极。

words.ex: Pay attention to your pronunciation.
Connect new words with what you already know.
words.trans: 把新词和你已知的联系起来。

words.ex: Knowledge comes from practice.
Review your notes after class.
It's wise to learn from mistakes.
words.trans: 从错误中学习是明智的。

label: u02
title: U2 I think that mooncakes are delicious! | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: We eat mooncakes on Mid-Autumn Festival.
Children carry lanterns on Lantern Festival.
words.trans: 孩子们在元宵节提灯笼。

words.ex: Don't talk to strangers.
We visit relatives during Spring Festival.
Someone stole my wallet.
Tie the ribbon onto the gift.
We admire the full moon on Mid-Autumn Festival.
Chang'e is the goddess of the moon.
Whoever steals the magic medicine will fly to the moon.
words.trans: 无论是谁偷了仙药都会飞到月亮上。

words.ex: I love folk stories.
We had ice cream for dessert.
words.trans: 我们吃了冰淇淋当甜点。

words.ex: There is a beautiful garden behind the house.
words.trans: 房子后面有一个漂亮的花园。

words.ex: It's a tradition to eat dumplings on New Year's Eve.
words.trans: 除夕吃饺子是一个传统。

words.ex: How do you celebrate Christmas?
The kids got treats on Halloween.
words.trans: 孩子们在万圣节得到了款待。

words.ex: Ghost stories are popular on Halloween.
words.trans: 鬼故事在万圣节很受欢迎。

words.ex: A spider is on the wall.
We exchange gifts at Christmas.
words.trans: 我们在圣诞节交换礼物。

words.ex: Have you read this novel?
I got a nice present from my parents.
words.trans: 我从父母那里收到了一份好礼物。

words.ex: The warmth of family makes me happy.
Spread joy and love this holiday season.
words.trans: 在这个节日季传播快乐和爱。

label: u03
title: U3 Could you please tell me where the restrooms are? | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: Could you tell me where the restroom is?
words.trans: 你能告诉我洗手间在哪里吗？

words.ex: I need to buy some shampoo.
I want to buy some stamps.
Let's go to the department store.
Take the escalator to the second floor.
What a fascinating city!
Let's find an uncrowded place.
words.trans: 我们找个不拥挤的地方吧。

words.ex: The subway is very convenient.
There's a new mall downtown.
words.trans: 市中心有一个新的购物中心。

words.ex: The clerk in the store was very helpful.
The bank is on the corner of Main Street.
Pass the post office, then turn left.
Turn left at the first crossing.
words.trans: 在第一个十字路口左转。

words.ex: Walk along this street.
It's three blocks away.
Could you write down your address?
Excuse me, which direction is the museum?
words.trans: 打扰一下，博物馆在哪个方向？

words.ex: Make a polite request when asking for help.
It's polite to say please and thank you.
words.trans: 说请和谢谢是有礼貌的。

words.ex: Can you direct me to the nearest hospital?
words.trans: 你能指给我去最近的医院的路吗？

words.ex: Is this the correct bus stop?
Is there a post office nearby?

label: u04
title: U4 I used to be afraid of the dark. | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: He is a humorous person.
She used to be silent in class.
words.trans: 她以前在课堂上很沉默。

words.ex: My sister is very helpful.
What's your score on the test?
The photo has a beautiful background.
words.trans: 这张照片的背景很漂亮。

words.ex: I have a job interview tomorrow.
She is an Asian student.
How do you deal with stress?
She used to be very shy.
I dare to speak in public now.
words.trans: 我现在敢在公共场合说话了。

words.ex: I don't like large crowds.
I have tons of homework.
I need some private time.
The guard stood at the door.
This job requires patience.
He is from a European country.
She has African roots.
He speaks British English.
He gave a wonderful speech.
words.trans: 他做了一场精彩的演讲。

words.ex: There is an ant on the ground.
I used to be afraid of insects.
My teacher had a big influence on me.
words.trans: 我的老师对我有很大影响。

label: u05
title: U5 What are the shirts made of? | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: We use chopsticks to eat noodles.
I found a coin on the street.
words.trans: 我在街上发现了一枚硬币。

words.ex: Please put the fork on the left.
She is wearing a silk blouse.
This ring is made of silver.
The window is made of glass.
This T-shirt is 100% cotton.
The bridge is made of steel.
Keep off the grass.
The leaves turn yellow in autumn.
This factory produces cars.
English is widely used around the world.
words.trans: 英语在全世界被广泛使用。

words.ex: The production process is very efficient.
The gifts are packed in beautiful boxes.
words.trans: 礼物被包装在漂亮的盒子里。

words.ex: This product is made in China.
words.trans: 这个产品是中国制造的。

words.ex: This wine is from France.
Cars are made in Germany.
What material is this made of?
There is a lot of traffic in the city.
The postman brings letters every day.
He wears a baseball cap.
In winter, I wear gloves.

label: u06
title: U6 When was it invented? | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: Who invented the light bulb?
The telephone is a great invention.
words.trans: 电话是一项伟大的发明。

words.ex: Edison was a famous inventor.
words.trans: 爱迪生是一位著名的发明家。

words.ex: He mentioned the new project.
We are working on a science project.
words.trans: 我们正在做一个科学项目。

words.ex: These lemons are sour.
Don't be afraid to make mistakes.
The discovery was accidental.
Use a ruler to draw a straight line.
Boil some water, please.
The door remained closed.
The soup smells delicious.
This is a national holiday.
China trades with many countries.
words.trans: 中国与许多国家进行贸易。

words.ex: No doubt, it's a great invention.
words.trans: 毫无疑问，这是一项伟大的发明。

words.ex: Keep the milk in the refrigerator.
The cake is very sweet.
The fried chicken is crispy.
The soup is a bit salty.
The customer is always right.
Divide the cake into four pieces.
The popularity of smartphones is growing.
words.trans: 智能手机的普及率在增长。

label: u07
title: U7 Teenagers should be allowed to choose their own clothes. | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: Smoking is not allowed here.
You can choose any book you like.
words.trans: 你可以选择任何你喜欢的书。

words.ex: It's your choice.
You are not allowed to drive until you are 18.
He got his driving license last week.
Teenagers should have more free time.
words.trans: 青少年应该有更多自由时间。

words.ex: She wants to get her ears pierced.
She is wearing beautiful earrings.
That's a silly rule.
Don't cry. Everything will be fine.
The kids are playing in the field.
Give me a hug!
Can you lift this box?
Work hard to achieve your dreams.
My family supports me.
I can manage my time well.
This is a great opportunity.
Safety comes first.
Parents should educate their children.
I want to volunteer at the hospital.
This is a valuable experience.
Think before you make a decision.

label: u08
title: U8 It must belong to Carla. | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: This book belongs to me.
Whose jacket is this?
A big truck drove past.
We had a picnic in the park.
The rabbit is eating carrots.
I attended a concert last night.
words.trans: 我昨晚参加了一场音乐会。

words.ex: This is a valuable painting.
She wears a pink dress.
Is there anybody in the room?
I heard a strange noise.
words.trans: 我听到了一个奇怪的声音。

words.ex: What's happening over there?
My neighbor is very kind.
The reporter interviewed the mayor.
The wind is blowing hard.
I feel sleepy after lunch.
The science lab is on the second floor.
I received a gift from my friend.
words.trans: 我收到了朋友的一份礼物。

words.ex: Do you believe in aliens?
This dress suits you very well.
I can't express how happy I am.
words.trans: 我无法表达我有多开心。

words.ex: Draw a circle on the paper.
She loves purple flowers.

label: u09
title: U9 I like music that I can dance to. | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: I prefer tea to coffee.
I love the lyrics of this song.
He likes electronic music.
The music has a smooth rhythm.
words.trans: 这段音乐有流畅的节奏。

words.ex: I like to read in my spare time.
words.trans: 我喜欢在空闲时间阅读。

words.ex: I have a good sense of direction.
I suppose you're right.
In that case, I'll come with you.
words.trans: 那样的话，我和你一起去。

words.ex: War is terrible.
Music reflects our feelings.
He is a master of the piano.
She performed a beautiful song.
words.trans: 她演唱了一首美丽的歌。

words.ex: The teacher praised her for her hard work.
The pain in my leg is getting better.
words.trans: 我腿上的疼痛正在好转。

words.ex: The wound healed quickly.
He is a talented musician.
words.trans: 他是一位有天赋的音乐家。

words.ex: I have a sense of achievement.
The song is full of sadness.
What a pity!
The total cost is $50.
I like watching TV dramas.
I enjoy watching nature documentaries.

label: u10
title: U10 You're supposed to shake hands. | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: We shake hands when we meet.
In some countries, people kiss on the cheek.
words.trans: 在一些国家，人们亲吻脸颊。

words.ex: Each country has its own customs.
words.trans: 每个国家都有自己的习俗。

words.ex: People greet each other in different ways.
words.trans: 人们用不同的方式互相问候。

words.ex: The atmosphere was very relaxed.
We value punctuality.
Drop by anytime if you're free.
Paris is the capital of France.
Let's meet at noon.
Don't get mad at me.
Make an effort to learn the local customs.
Don't forget your passport.
Write with chalk on the blackboard.
The teacher is writing on the blackboard.
It's cold in northern China.
We drove along the coast.
Which season do you like best?
Knock on the door before entering.
These are the basic rules.
I'm on an exchange program.
words.trans: 我在参加一个交换项目。

words.ex: I gradually got used to the culture.
words.trans: 我逐渐适应了这里的文化。

words.ex: It's polite to say thank you.

label: u11
title: U11 Sad movies make me cry. | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: I would rather stay at home.
His words drove me crazy.
Friendship is very important.
The king ruled the country wisely.
words.trans: 国王英明地统治着国家。

words.ex: The prime minister gave a speech.
He is the minister of education.
Health is more important than wealth.
He won fame as a writer.
words.trans: 他作为作家赢得了声誉。

words.ex: The queen was very kind.
You look pale. Are you OK?
words.trans: 你看起来很苍白。你还好吗？

words.ex: The doctor examined the patient.
He can neither read nor write.
Neither answer is correct.
He works as a banker.
His face turned pale.
He felt guilty about lying.
Tell me the truth.
The general led the army.
My weight is 60 kilograms.
Set a goal and work towards it.
words.trans: 设定一个目标并为之努力。

words.ex: The coach taught us how to play.
We reached an agreement.

label: u12
title: U12 Life is full of the unexpected. | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: I left my backpack on the bus.
words.trans: 我把背包落在公交车上了。

words.ex: I overslept and missed the bus.
words.trans: 我睡过头了，错过了公交车。

words.ex: Life is full of the unexpected.
The street is two blocks away.
The workers are building a new road.
words.trans: 工人们正在修一条新路。

words.ex: The plane flew above the clouds.
The room was empty.
Don't stare at people.
He stared at me in disbelief.
The building burned down.
I'm lucky to be alive.
We arrived at the airport at 6 AM.
Wait till I come back.
The sun sets in the west.
Let's go to the farmer's market.
Would you like some cream in your coffee?
I love apple pie.
The police officer helped us.
The sun disappeared behind the clouds.
words.trans: 太阳消失在了云层后面。

words.ex: I felt so embarrassed.
The teacher announced the test results.
Shut the door, please.

label: u13
title: U13 We're trying to save the earth! | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: Please don't litter.
The bottle sank to the bottom of the river.
The fishermen caught a lot of fish.
Burning coal causes air pollution.
The pollution makes the city ugly.
Reading has many advantages.
The industry is growing fast.
words.trans: 这个行业正在快速发展。

words.ex: There should be laws to protect the environment.
words.trans: 应该有保护环境的法律。

words.ex: Littering is against the law.
Bring a reusable bag when shopping.
words.trans: 购物时带一个可重复使用的袋子。

words.ex: Plastic bottles can be recycled.
We should recycle paper and glass.
words.trans: 我们应该回收纸和玻璃。

words.ex: Use cloth napkins instead of paper ones.
words.trans: 使用布餐巾代替纸餐巾。

words.ex: Save energy by turning off lights.
Public transportation is better for the environment.
We need to protect the environment.
Air pollution is a serious problem.
words.trans: 空气污染是一个严重的问题。

words.ex: We should protect endangered animals.
words.trans: 我们应该保护濒危动物。

words.ex: Don't throw away recyclable materials.
words.trans: 不要扔掉可回收的材料。

words.ex: Glass can be recycled many times.
Reduce the use of plastic bags.
Reuse old bottles as vases.

label: u14
title: U14 I remember meeting all of you in Grade 7. | 初中英语九年级

words.ex: We did a survey about reading habits.
words.trans: 我们做了一个关于阅读习惯的调查。

words.ex: She set high standards for herself.
words.trans: 她为自己设定了高标准。

words.ex: We sat in the front row.
I practice the keyboard every day.
Follow the instructions carefully.
Double-check your answers.
Shall we go now?
I overcame my fear of speaking.
We will go to separate high schools.
Birds fly with their wings.
She is a very caring person.
words.trans: 她是一个非常关心他人的人。

words.ex: I will attend senior high school.
This classroom is ours.
He is a true gentleman.
The graduation ceremony is next week.
The opening ceremony was beautiful.
I congratulate you on your success.
Be thirsty for knowledge.
None of us knew the answer.
words.trans: 我们没有一个人知道答案。

words.ex: Finish the task before Friday.
There is a bright future ahead.
Be responsible for your actions.
